content.query:
-- Claims
-- use Data Factory pipeline "load optimizer claims" to load lexisnexis/Optimizer_Inbound/2023q4_tokenized_socio_header_20231009_20231214_slim_for_dataprime.csv.gz
--1438066765
select count(*) from [customer].[stg_claims_t];
--405616502
select top 10 a.* from [customer].[stg_claims_t] a;

-- run data factory pipeline, then update
 update [customer].[stg_claims_t]
 set PATIENT_ZIP_3 = null
 where [PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '';

 select * from [customer].[stg_claims_t]
 where [PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '';

-- Mortality
-- use the four files in lexisnexis/Optimizer_Inbound/2024Mortality
--187642940
select count(*) from [customer].[stg_mortality_t]
select * from [customer].[stg_mortality_t]

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE customer.ext_stg_mortality1_t (
	[record_id] nvarchar(200) NULL,
	[input_token] nvarchar(200) NULL,
	[UDF1] nvarchar(200) NULL,
	[UDF2] nvarchar(200) NULL,
	[UDF3] nvarchar(200) NULL,	
	[deceased_match_indicator] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[date_of_death] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[verified_or_proof_code] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[deceased_source] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[deceased_county] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[deceased_state] [nvarchar](2)  NULL,
	[confidence_score] [nvarchar](5)  NULL
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'Optimizer_Inbound/2024Mortality/LNRC_LNR101_1000003_1000006_20240326_900000_01_17912_appended.txt',
	DATA_SOURCE = [lexisnexis_deidstrgeaccdevelopment_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [LexisNexisPipeDelimitedFormat]
	)
GO

-- 

-- check heii token coverage on the claims tokens
select count(*), count(distinct a.token) as claims_distinct_token, count(b.token) as heii_token, count(distinct b.token) as heii_distinct_token
from
(select distinct token from [customer].[stg_claims_t]) a
left join [customer].[stg_heii_t] b
    on a.token = b.token
;
-- 
187642936
187642936
46910734
46910734


select a.token, b.token
from
(select top 1000 token from [customer].[stg_claims_t]) a
left join [customer].[stg_heii_t] b
    on a.token = b.token
where b.token is null
;
